channel.title: Posts on Taskin's site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Taskin's site

item.title: Simple Keyboard: a keyboard that doesn't have to try
item.description: Simple Keyboard is a keyboard app for Android OS based on the AOSP Keyboard. It is available on both F-Droid repository and Google Play Store. And when needed, its APK can be directly grabbed from the project’s Github releases page here. One of the reasons I switched to this keyboard had been that at the time I used to use Hacker’s Keyboard and wanted to try out something else. But one of the phones I had been using was this Samsung Galaxy running Android 4.
